{{Quote|Why are you doing this to me? It's not like I've ever messed with you, Fett.|Wac Bur to Boba Fett|<ref name="BoFett" />}}
'''Wac Bur''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who worked as a [[Forger (profession)/Legends|counterfeiter]] and [[Forger (profession)/Legends|forger]]. In [[24 ABY/Legends|24 ABY]], he sold fake art to [[Gebbu]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who, in retaliation, sent the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] after him. Fett tracked Bur down on the<ref name="BoFett" /> [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. After leading Fett in a mad chase through a network of alleyways, Bur hid in a pile of crates and fruitlessly attempted to plead for his life. He was [[Death/Legends|killed]] by Fett when he refused to surrender.<ref name="BoFett" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|It's not like Gebbu's a victim. Why don't you go after real criminals?|Wac Bur, to Boba Fett|<ref name="BoFett" />}}
Unusually overweight for a Rodian, Wac Bur was a cowardly individual. He was also highly hypocritical, attempting to lecture Fett on morality when he himself was nothing more than a criminal.<ref name="BoFett" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wac Bur first appeared in [[Karen Traviss]]' [[2006]] [[eBook]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''.<ref name="BoFett" />
